Name: Pulsating Witch
Title: Lisa: Pulsating Witch
Desc: As a Librarian who has read through tens of thousands of volumes, of course it's trivial for me to remember how to win...
Source: Reward for inviting Lisa to a duel at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives

Talent.Name: Pulsating Witch
Talent.Desc: After you switch to <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1409]</color>, who has this card equipped: Attach <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C114091]</color> to the opposing active character. (Once per Round)\n(You must have $[A1409] in your deck to add this card to your deck.)

C114091.Name: Conductive
C114091.Desc:
This status starts with 2 stacks of Conductive. When attached repeatedly, Conductive stack +1. Conductive can be stacked to a maximum of 4 stacks.
<color=#FFFFFFFF>End Phase: </color>Accumulate 1 stack of Conductive.

<color=#FFFFFFFF>When the character attached with Conductive takes DMG from $[S14092]: </color>Remove this status and DMG +1 for each stack of Conductive.
